.'masquerade' is invalid for egress zone 'HOST'r9
/'masquerade' is invalid for ingress zone 'HOST'r;
R'masquerade' cannot be used in a policy if an ingress zone has assigned interfaces

C'forward-port' requires 'to-addr' if egress zone is 'ANY' or a zone
